Query:
UNLOAD (SELECT upgrade.upgrade, count(*) AS change 
FROM (SELECT * 
FROM resstock_2024_amy2018_release_2_metadata 
WHERE resstock_2024_amy2018_release_2_metadata.upgrade != 0) AS upgrade JOIN (SELECT * 
FROM resstock_2024_amy2018_release_2_metadata 
WHERE resstock_2024_amy2018_release_2_metadata.upgrade = 0) AS baseline ON baseline.bldg_id = upgrade.bldg_id 
WHERE baseline.applicability = true AND upgrade.applicability = true AND (baseline."out.electricity.total.energy_consumption" - upgrade."out.electricity.total.energy_consumption" >= 0.001 OR baseline."out.natural_gas.total.energy_consumption" - upgrade."out.natural_gas.total.energy_consumption" >= 0.001 OR baseline."out.fuel_oil.total.energy_consumption" - upgrade."out.fuel_oil.total.energy_consumption" >= 0.001 OR baseline."out.propane.total.energy_consumption" - upgrade."out.propane.total.energy_consumption" >= 0.001) GROUP BY 1 ORDER BY 1) 
 TO 's3://resstock-core/bsq_athena_unload_results/30674bb73aa3b73c919a13e5f010048f237c718e1671447856bf2a1f6cf9f949/f66a865f-1510-41de-82ff-91033206d765/' 
 WITH (format = 'PARQUET')
